nasb.text: Now when the seventh month came, and the sons of Israel were in the cities, the people gathered together as one man to Jerusalem.

esv.text: When the seventh month came, and the children of Israel were in the towns, the people gathered as one man to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 到了七月，各城裡的以色列人，如同一人，都在耶路撒冷聚集。

ccb.text: 到了七月，以色列人已安居各城，他们万众一心地聚集在耶路撒冷。
